field.name: x_studio_beer
field.help: Link the product to the brewed product. Brewed product should be in the product category All/Brewed

div.p: Write one or two paragraphs describing your product or services. To be successful your content needs to be useful to your readers.
Start with the customer – find out what they want and give it to them.
You don't know what do to next weekend ?!
Don't hesitate and come visit us! We will show you how

img.class: figure-img img-thumbnail padding-large img img-fluid o_we_custom_image

figure.figcaption: The perfect beverage to share with your friends.

div.p:
We are a team of passionate people whose goal is to improve everyone's life through disruptive products. We build great products to solve your business problems.
Our products are designed for small to medium size companies willing to optimize their performance.

i.class: fa fa-5x fa-leaf text-o-color-3 mx-auto my-4

data.xpath:
Daily fresh products combined with our professional yet convivial service
to create a true gastronomic experience.

i.class: fa fa-2x fa-coffee rounded-circle bg-primary m-3

data.xpath:
Help you start your morning right.
From 7:30 pm to 10:30 pm

i.class: fa fa-2x fa-cutlery rounded-circle bg-400 m-3

data.xpath:
Take a break from your busy schedule.
From 11:30 pm to 14:30 am

i.class: fa fa-2x fa-glass rounded-circle bg-secondary m-3

data.xpath:
Enjoy tasty food with friends.
From 6:30 am to 10:30 am

Taste our chef special, the macon two shells of almond macaroon
topped with a creamy orange blossom scent.
The perfect dessert to share for the table.

attribute.name: class
attribute.add: s_parallax parallax s_parallax_is_fixed o_cc o_cc5 pt120 pb104

p.em: Add the description of this dish here.

data.xpath: Cosy and friendly, good atmosphere and super food. Especially the spiced fruit crumble.
This place is perfect for groups or a casual date night.
A truly exquisite dining experience. I highly recommend the Mustard Sauce, out of this world.
A healthy kitchen with local products. We’re constantly looking to propose new products and receipts. While respecting seasons' products and nature.

At the Bistro, you can expect a healthy kitchen on a daily basis.
Come and visit us for a Sunday brunch, healthy juices full of nutrition, or delicious cakes that satisfy your sweet tooth. And each day, you’ll discover our Today’s Special.

div.class: d-flex flex-lg-row justify-content-between w-100 align-items-center flex-wrap flex-lg-nowrap

li.class: o_offcanvas_menu_toggler order-first navbar-toggler text-end border-0 o_not_editable
o_offcanvas_logo_container order-last navbar-toggler py-4 order-1 mt-auto text-center border-0

i.class: fa fa-facebook rounded-circle rounded shadow-sm o_editable_media
fa fa-twitter rounded-circle rounded shadow-sm o_editable_media
fa fa-linkedin rounded-circle rounded shadow-sm o_editable_media

div.p: 250 Executive Park Blvd, Suite 3400 • San Francisco CA 94134 • United States

a.title: Scroll To Top
a.class: btn btn-primary rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

t.t-value: keep('/shop'+ ('/category/'+slug(category)) if category else None, search=0) or '/shop'

t.t-if: product_variant_id and template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale

div.p: Our Lager is the epitome of refreshment. Crisp, clean, and delightfully balanced, it's the perfect choice for those seeking a classic and timeless beer experience. With a golden hue and a mild hop aroma, this lager offers a smooth, easy-drinking profile that's great for any occasion. Raise a glass to tradition and savor the pure, uncomplicated taste of Lager.

Our Blond beer is a radiant and approachable brew that radiates sunshine in every sip. With its light, straw-colored appearance and a hint of citrus and floral notes, this beer is the embodiment of a carefree, laid-back lifestyle. It's a splendid choice for those who appreciate a touch of sweetness and a gentle, well-balanced finish. Embrace the joy of our Blond and let your taste buds dance with delight.

Our Brown beer is a rich and flavorful masterpiece that exudes warmth and comfort. With its deep mahogany hue and a complex blend of roasted malt and caramel flavors, this beer offers a robust and satisfying experience. Perfect for those who crave depth and character in their brew, our Brown beer invites you to savor each sip, revealing layers of nutty, toasty goodness. Discover the comforting embrace of Brown beer today.
Appointment failed! The selected timeslot is not available anymore. Someone has booked the same time slot a few seconds before you.
Appointment failed! The selected timeslot is not available. It appears you already have another meeting with us at that date.
Appointment canceled! You can schedule another appointment from here.

t.t-value: not appointment_type.resource_ids if not based_on_users else 1

div.t-if: (not based_on_users and no_resources) or (based_on_users and no_users) or no_slots

t.t: This appointment type has no availabilities because it has no staff assigned and does not have any opening hours configured
This appointment type has no availabilities because it has no staff assigned
This appointment type has no availabilities because it does not have any opening hours configured
This appointment type has no availabilities because it has no resource assigned and does not have any opening hours configured
This appointment type has no availabilities because it has no resource assigned
This appointment type has no availabilities because it does not have any opening hours configured

div.t-attf-class: o_appointment_info_main #{'col-12' if month_first_available is False or not appointment_type.active else 'col-lg-8'}

div.name: resource_select
div.t-attf-class: col-12 d-flex float-start mb-3 #{'o_hidden' if hide_select_dropdown else ''}
div.label: For

div.t-attf-class: o_appointment_intro text-muted #{'d-none' if not appointment_type.active else ''} #{'pt-1 mb-4' if not is_html_empty(appointment_type.message_intro) else 'd-none'}
o_appointment_timezone_selection #{'d-none' if month_first_available is False or not appointment_type.active else ''}
col-lg-4 mb-2 o_appointment_details_column o_not_editable #{'d-none' if month_first_available is False or not appointment_type.active else ''}

div.class: d-flex fs-6 lh-lg text-muted w-100 ps-0 mb-1

i.class: fa fa-map-marker o_appointment_fa_width text-center fs-5 me-2 mt-1

div.class: d-flex text-muted fs-6 lh-lg w-100 ps-0 py-1

i.class: fa fa-clock-o o_appointment_fa_width text-center fs-5 me-2 mt-1

div.t-if: slots and not based_on_users and appointment_type.resource_manage_capacity and max_capacity
div.class: d-flex fs-6 lh-lg w-100 ps-0 py-1

i.class: fa fa-group my-auto o_appointment_fa_width text-center fs-5 me-2 text-muted

div.data-editor-message: DROP BUILDING BLOCKS HERE TO MAKE THEM AVAILABLE ACROSS ALL APPOINTMENTS

nav.class: o_wappointment_navbar navbar border-top shadow-sm d-print-none py-0

a.class: o_wappointment_navbar_link navbar-brand btn px-0 h4 my-0 me-auto

xpath.attribute: appointment_type.assign_method != 'time_auto_assign' and based_on_users and not skip_resource_selection
appointment_type.assign_method == 'resource_time' and not based_on_users and not skip_resource_selection

label.t-attf-class: btn btn-{{navClass}} #{_activeClasses if layout_mode != 'list' else None} o_wsale_apply_grid
label.title: Grid

label.t-attf-class: btn btn-{{navClass}} #{_activeClasses if layout_mode == 'list' else None} o_wsale_apply_list
label.title: List

t.t-value: { 'email_to': res_company.email, 'name': request.params.get('name', ''), 'phone': request.params.get('phone', ''), 'email_from': request.params.get('email_from', ''), 'company': request.params.get('company', ''), 'subject': request.params.get('subject', ''), }

section.class: s_title parallax s_parallax_is_fixed bg-black-50 pt24 pb24

div.p:
Contact us about anything related to our company or services.
We'll do our best to get back to you as soon as possible.

div.style: position: relative !important; height: 0px !important; width: 0px !important; float: left !important;
